lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Congratulations, brave knight, on aiding Camelot in so many ways! If we ever require help again, I will make sure to call upon you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Welcome, brave knight.

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: I have a piece of memorabilia from our last adventure for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, Merlin. I was wondering, can I change my respawn point back to Camelot?

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: I would be more than happy to oblige. Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: You have chosen...sensibly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, no thanks. I like my respawn point.

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Well then, leave me to my business.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, Merlin. I was wondering, can I change my respawn point back to Lumbridge?

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Certainly, if that is what you truly want. Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: I have done as you asked. Your presence will be missed here.

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Would you like to hear how I removed the Sinclairs from Camelot?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Well, after I climbed out the vent, I snuck aboard a passing trade ship that dropped me at Catherby. From there, I returned to Camelot and used the Sinclairs own secret entrance against them. I used some of my

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: own inventions to create a great deal of chaos and drove them from the house. Then I made sure they returned to their mansion and told them if they ever stepped foot from it again, I'd turn them all into rabbits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you get your magic powers back?

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Ah, Morgan's spell was not hard to break once I had access to my workshop. It's rather technical, so I won't bore you with the details.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You had an exciting day!

sections.title: After completion of the Knight Waves

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Excuse me for rushing off like this, but I must get back to my workroom.

lines.speaker: Merlin
lines.text: Well done, young adventurer. You truly are a worthy knight.
